name: Norddampf Voity
summary: An affordable hybrid vaporiser with a ceramic chamber, for first-time or mid-tier dry-herb patients.
description: The Voity combines conduction, convection and infrared heating in a nano-glazed ceramic C-Core chamber that wipes clean and keeps herb from sticking. Three presets (180, 200, 220°C) keep operation simple, and a magnetic zirconia mouthpiece protects flavour. It heats in about 30 seconds and gets up to 12 sessions from the 1,800mAh battery, charged over USB-C in around an hour. At 85g and a low price it's a sensible entry point for a patient who wants real hybrid heating without spending much. Fixed presets mean less fine control than dialled devices, which is the trade-off for the simplicity.
